After EACH new sentence, respond briefly. Keep your entire response under 100 words. Use this exact format (both sections are required):

GUESS: <your best guess for the name of the event being described — be specific, e.g. "The French Revolution" not just "a revolution">

Rules:
- You may refine your GUESS each round as more information arrives.
- Your GUESS should name the specific event, not just a broad category.
- You have up to 10 rounds total.
- Be concise — quality of reasoning matters more than length.
